HEADING: Suppressed Emails
INFO_NOTE: Emails listed here have been blocked by the email provider due to bounces, complaints, or unsubscribes. These addresses will not receive any emails until the suppression is removed.
EMPTY_STATE: No suppressed emails found for your account.
EMPTY_STATE_FILTERED: No suppressed emails match your filter.
SUCCESS_REMOVED: Suppression removed successfully. The email address can now receive emails again.
ERROR_REMOVE_FAILED: Failed to remove the suppression from the email provider. Please try again later.
RATE_LIMIT_MONTHLY: Monthly removal limit reached (5 per month). Please try again next month.
